scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Foundation.Proofs.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.build:ts: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Foundation.Proofs.fsproj -o dist-ts --lang typescript --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/foundation-proofs diagnostics are covered by F# compile'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/foundation-proofs lint is covered by F# compile'
scripts.proofs: pnpm run build:ts && tsx dist-ts/Program.ts proof run all --report-dir ../../.verification-reports/foundation-proofs
